stem: The system of equations 4x + 9y = 1 and ax + by = 1 has infinitely many solutions in the xy-plane, where a and b are constants. Which equation must also represent the same line?
rationale:
Choice D is correct. If two equations have infinitely many solutions, one must be a constant multiple of the other. The equation 8x + 18y = 2 is obtained by multiplying 4x + 9y = 1 by 2, so they represent the same line.

Choice A changes only the constant term, producing a parallel (not identical) line. Choices B and C change one coefficient, producing different lines.
